quotes.text: grug have cardinal rule: never refactor and change functionality at same time. grug see mass mass senior devs do this and mass mass problems every time.
quotes.author: The Grug Brained Developer

quotes.text: Focused, hard work is the real key to success. Keep your eyes on the goal, and just keep taking the next step towards completing it.
quotes.author: John Carmack

quotes.text: The real lesson is: finish things. Not starting is fine. Not finishing is a problem.
quotes.author: Gwern Branwen

quotes.text: Always leave the code better than you found it.
quotes.author: Robert C. Martin (Uncle Bob)
quotes.source: Clean Code (adapted from Boy Scout Rule)

quotes.text:
Day 1: 'Implement user authentication system with JWT tokens'
Day 47: 'fix'
Day 48: 'fix fix'
Day 49: 'please work'
quotes.author: Unknown
quotes.source: Dev Twitter / every git log ever

quotes.text: Solo founders don't lack ideas. They lack the discipline to ship one idea instead of starting five.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Discipline is choosing between what you want now and what you want most. Most people choose now.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The indie hacker's biggest enemy isn't competition. It's shiny object syndrome. Pick one thing and ship it.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best engineers are the ones who know what not to build.
quotes.author: based
